properties.dose: Sublingual Threshold: 50-100ug Light: 150-300ug Common: 300-600ug Strong: 600-1000ug. Insufflated Light: 50-200ug Common: 200-400ug Strong: 400-800ug.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: A potent psychedelic phenethylamine and derivative of 2C-E, usually sold on blotters. May be missold as LSD. Effects include vivid hallucinations, stimulation, heavy body load and vasoconstriction. At high doses vasoconstriction can endanger life, exercise caution.
properties.test-kits: Marquis: Red > Yellow. | Mecke: Green. | Mandelin: Red. | Ehrlich: No colour change.
properties.warning: Do not exceed 2mg+ of this compound.
